title: Aesthetic Windows
description: Aesthetic Windows adds decorative and functional windows. Perfect for builders who want more variety and visual flair in their architecture.
body:
**Aesthetic Windows** is a decorative building mod that adds new window blocks to Minecraft, offering more architectural depth and visual variety for builders of all styles. Instead of relying solely on standard glass panes, this mod provides handcrafted window designs tailored to match different materials and themes — from rustic cabins to stone towers.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2c1343a82b9a87d5023fb2888be622454aa8113.png)

### Material-Matching Windows
Each window is available in multiple material styles, including various wood and stone looks, helping them blend seamlessly into any build palette.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f58499179e59ea3d7ec8352b357ad5b4331a1811.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9591787e0c34b3596243323527ee017f5ce9327.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c72190e03e7e186a037d6e8de07dd4d25cfd1d.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1ab97e004a6a96a65001bdd1a11b6f726d05b5a.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f61b13d8067d5662c288bf35d59a61bf1ffa951e.png)

### Window Types
- The mod currently includes:
- Simple Windows – Clean, single-frame decorative blocks
- Four-Pane Windows – Cross-shaped designs dividing the glass into quarters
- Vertical Variants – Tall, slender versions of the above for towers, multi-floor buildings, and decorative vertical layouts

### Great for Builders
- These windows are fully block-based (not panes), allowing for more flexibility in builds:
- Frame windows within log beams or stone borders
- Stack vertically or horizontally for custom shapes
- Combine different window types for stylistic variety

### Survival-Friendly and Aesthetic-Driven
Window blocks are designed to be used in survival mode and blend visually with Minecraft’s vanilla aesthetic. Whether you’re building a medieval town, a cottage in the woods, or a fantasy castle, these windows enhance your architecture without clashing with vanilla textures.
